examples: The concussive force roiled though Kurt's insides.
Concussive Barrage (Marksmanship) : Can now proc from Volley and Multi-shot attacks.
Knock an enemy to their death using Pharah's Concussive Blast in Quick or Competitive Play.
Their cases share a common thread -- repeated concussions, sub-concussive blows to the head, or both.
The act of an offensive lineman hitting a defensive lineman on every play produces a low level concussive hit.
